summary: The job failed type checking: mypy reported hundreds of 'Module has no attribute' errors originating from pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py and pandas/core/arrays/datetimes.py.
root_cause: mypy reported many 'Module has no attribute' type errors (e.g. in pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py and pandas/core/arrays/datetimes.py), causing the type-check step to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows the type checker reported a large number of errors, indicating the job failed due to type-checking issues.

suggested_fix: Open the listed mypy error locations (for example, pandas/core/arrays/arrow/array.py:2708 and pandas/core/arrays/datetimes.py:1368), correct the incorrect imports/attribute usages or provide proper typing stubs for the referenced modules, and re-run the type checker (mypy) locally until the 'Module has no attribute' errors are resolved.
